name: Sky Harbour Group Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are an aviation infrastructure development company building the first nationwide network of Home Base Operator (HBO)campuses designed exclusively for business aircraft. We develop, lease and manage general aviation hangars across the United States, targeting airfields in markets with significant based aircraft populations and high hangar demand.
